mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = #{role}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, role, display_name, email_enc, phone_enc, is_active, failed_attempts, lockout_expiry) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{displayName}, #{emailEncrypted}, #{phoneEncrypted}, #{active}, #{failedAttempts}, #{lockoutExpiry})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, role = #{role}, display_name = #{displayName}, email_enc = #{emailEncrypted}, phone_enc = #{phoneEncrypted}, is_active = #{active}, must_change_password = #{mustChangePassword}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET failed_attempts = #{failedAttempts}, lockout_expiry = #{lockoutExpiry}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET failed_attempts = 0, lockout_expiry = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET is_active = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
